metric_value: Supply Chain Management / e-Procurement / e-Sourcing
notes: Tim Minahan credited by Peter S. Kastner as the Aberdeen Group analyst who developed the firm's e-Procurement, e-Sourcing, e-Travel, and e-Expense practice coverage. Sole lead on the two named 2000 e-Procurement surveys defining the canonical Aberdeen e-Procurement taxonomy (catalog management, transaction management EDI/OBI/XML/e-mail, marketplace strategies, dynamic pricing, reverse auctions). Career trajectory (CMO SAP Ariba; CMO Coupa; EVP Strategy Citrix) built directly on the SCM/procurement-software category Aberdeen helped frame.
